verdict.summary: Round 5 remains clean. The capped eligibility predicate and deriveGraph still share the same injective term identity, scan order, node limit, adjacency behavior, self-loop exclusion, and admitted-resource requirement. The cap-boundary regressions exercise both the excluded-endpoint decline and admitted-endpoint success paths, so the toggle cannot offer a graph that derivation cannot draw. The graph implementation remains invocation-path lazy, term data is rendered through React escaping, and no correctness, soundness, security, or test-validity defect is evident in the supplied diff.
